commit.message:
Initial commit: CNN Feature Visualization

A web application that visualizes how CNNs extract features from images.
Features:
- Handwritten digit input (MNIST style)
- Feature map visualization for each layer
- Filter weight visualization
- Convolution animation
- Real-time digit recognition (~91% accuracy)

Tech stack: HTML/CSS/JavaScript, TensorFlow.js, Canvas 2D

commit.message:
refactor: complete BG 13.6-7 field mapping in discover()

discover() now accurately maps the entire Ksetra per BG 13.6-7:
- antahkarana: 5 inner instruments with module paths
- ksetrajna: meta-observer reference
- kshetra_properties: vedana, cetana, dhrti, iccha/dvesha
- jnanendriyas: 5 knowledge senses with perception scope (local)
- karmendriyas: 5 action organs with component mappings
- Removed flat capabilities list in favor of structured field

Identifies the gap: all 5 jnanendriyas perceive "local" only.
GitHub (CI/CD, wiki, discussions, issues) = external perception
that agent-city already uses as OS. Steward's senses don't yet
reach beyond the local filesystem.

commit.message:
Fix agent install to read strawpot.install from AGENT.md (#157)

## Summary
- `_ensure_agent_installed` now parses `metadata.strawpot.install.<os>`
from AGENT.md frontmatter and runs the install command when the agent
binary is missing
- Falls back to `install.sh` on disk if no frontmatter install is
defined
- Also applies after `strawhub install` downloads the agent files
- Isolates existing bootstrap tests from real `~/.strawpot/` to prevent
flaky failures on dev machines

## Test plan
- [x] `pytest cli/tests/test_cli_bootstrap.py` — 23 passed
- [x] `pytest cli/tests/test_cli.py cli/tests/test_cli_headless.py` — 16
passed
- [ ] Manual: install an agent with `strawpot.install` in AGENT.md,
verify install command runs

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix ScrollReveal crash on 8 pages + raise all prices

ROOT CAUSE: ScrollReveal is a default export but all 8 pages imported
it as a named export (m.ScrollReveal → undefined → crash on render).
Fix: use direct default import with next/dynamic.

Affected pages: inkoop, faq, contact, over-ons, retourbeleid,
algemene-voorwaarden, track, verlanglijst

Prices raised across 3DS and Switch — Y €69.95, Ultra Sun €79.95,
Ultra Moon €89.95, Rumble €29.95, Mario RPG €37.95, NSMBU €44.95,
GTA Trilogy €37.95, all Switch games up.

commit.message:
fix(e2e): expand minor accordion before checking finding visibility

When ALL findings are minor severity, they're hidden in the collapsed
accordion (Story 4.1a progressive disclosure). The E2E tests must
expand the accordion BEFORE asserting finding-compact-row visibility.

Previous fix had accordion expansion after the visibility check,
causing failures when the pipeline only produced minor findings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix console spinner buffering and remove Sonos from relay env

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix critical bugs: duplicate const, portable settings path, socket leaks

Critical fixes:
- Remove duplicate `const btnMaximize` that caused SyntaxError (app couldn't start)
- Use PORTABLE_EXECUTABLE_DIR for settings.json path in portable exe
- Add asarUnpack for native cap module
- Close UDP socket on port validation failure (resource leak)
- Add ping generation counter to prevent stale results on stop/start
- Guard alarm timer against empty targetStatus (false "all clear" UDP)
- Validate ping addresses against safe pattern
- Use stricter TTL= regex for ping result parsing
- Restrict removeAllListeners to allowed IPC channels
- Add window.view3d null guards in IPC handlers
- Atomic settings write via tmp+rename
- Fix VLAN check to use nbytes instead of buffer.length
- Replace throw 'skip' with proper conditional

commit.message:
A11y + code cleanup — sync html lang attr, remove dead dictionary keys, simplify map

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add Shadow Genome, heuristic patterns, and trust dynamics (v0.3.0)

Phase 1: Shadow Genome store — ShadowGenomeStore Protocol, thread-safe
InMemoryShadowGenomeStore with FIFO eviction, 10-variant failure classifier,
negative constraint generation for learning injection.

Phase 2: CWE-referenced heuristic patterns — 10 default patterns (INJ001,
INJ002, SEC001, SEC002, PII001, PII002, CMP001, CRY001, AUTH001, DEP001),
match_content scanner, and composable classify_risk with extra_l3_triggers
parameter. Client.py delegates risk classification to patterns module.

Phase 3: CBT/KBT/IBT trust dynamics — TrustConfig frozen dataclass,
determine_stage, apply_outcome, is_probationary, calculate_influence_weight,
score_to_mesh_trust. All pure functions, no side effects.

61 new tests (22 + 17 + 22), 174 total. Zero new external dependencies.

commit.message:
Dynamic newspaper layout: rotate article placement around editorial sections

Each thematic section now cycles through 5 layout variants to eliminate
white space and give a genuine newspaper feel:

- right: prose left, article cards stacked on right
- left: cards on left, prose on right
- top: articles in horizontal row above full-width 2-col prose
- bottom: full-width prose above, articles in horizontal row below
- surround: articles flanking prose on both sides (CSS grid 3-col)
- wide: 2-column prose when section has no cited articles

Layout is selected by rotating _LAYOUT_SEQ by section index, adjusted for
article count (single articles alternate left/right; surround needs 2+).

Row-mode cards (top/bottom) use a shorter thumbnail and 2-line lede.
Responsive: surround collapses to single column, row cards wrap.
Print: surround grid uses fixed pt widths, prose-wide goes 2-col.

commit.message:
fix(ml): preserve else-branch defaults when no original feature_context

The previous commit injected historicalOccupancy into feature_context
even when the caller passed None, causing add_bridge_day_feature to run
and crash with KeyError('date_local') — that function was never called
in the no-context path before.

Fix: only inject into feature_context when it was non-None. In the else
branch, call add_park_occupancy_feature directly with a minimal context
containing only historicalOccupancy + baseTime, leaving all other
defaults (bridge_day=0, virtual_queue=0, etc.) unchanged.

commit.message:
Add project files upload with drag-and-drop UI (#156)

## Summary
- New backend files router (`/api/projects/{id}/files`) with list,
multipart upload, and delete endpoints
- Path traversal protection via `is_relative_to()` checks
- New `ProjectFilesTab` component with drag-and-drop upload zone and
file table
- Multipart upload support added to API client (separate `uploadRequest`
bypassing JSON content-type)
- `ProjectDetail` page now has Sessions and Files tabs

## Follow-up work
- [ ] Pass `.strawpot/files/` path to agents via CLI (`--files-dir`
flag) and wrapper protocol
- [ ] Update `strawpot_*_cli` repos to map files path to underlying
agent (e.g. `--add-dir` for Claude Code)
- [ ] Add `@` file annotation in Launch Session dialog to select files
as session context

## Test plan
- [ ] Navigate to a project → see Sessions and Files tabs
- [ ] Files tab shows empty state initially
- [ ] Drag a file onto the drop zone → file appears in the list
- [ ] Click browse → select files → uploaded and listed
- [ ] Verify file exists at `<project>/.strawpot/files/<filename>`
- [ ] Click delete on a file → file removed from list and disk
- [ ] Attempt upload with path traversal (`../`) → rejected

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove redundant ModCommandHandlerAfter from EnableInventoryInVehicle

commit.message:
Fix PATCH /api/crm/documents/update to accept numeric id and partial s3_key match

The endpoint was matching only on exact url column, which stores expiring
presigned URLs. Now accepts:
1. Numeric id (preferred, most reliable)
2. Exact url match (presigned URL)
3. Partial match on clean S3 key path extracted from the url column

Add PIN Knowledge Quiz with spaced-repetition learning system

architecture, roles, endpoints, monitoring, emerging) with SM-2 spaced
repetition, localStorage persistence, category mastery dashboard, and
detailed explanations for missed answers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ml): use historical occupancy profile for future prediction rows

park_occupancy_pct (15% feature importance) was broadcast from current
real-time value to ALL prediction rows including those 24h/14d in the
future, causing flat predictions with no time-of-day variation.

Fix:
- db.py: add fetch_historical_park_occupancy() - computes expected
  park occupancy by (DOW, hour) over last 8 weeks using per-ride P50
  baseline (matching TypeScript calculation), 1h cache
- predict.py: fetch historical profile once per prediction call and
  inject into feature_context before feature engineering
- features.py: add_park_occupancy_feature now applies:
  - Real-time parkOccupancy for rows within ±2h of base_time
  - Historical (DOW, hour) profile for all future rows
  - Historical profile for daily predictions with no real-time context
